scripts.postinstall: mv node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app node_modules/electron/dist/ideafy.app 2>/dev/null; mv 'node_modules/electron/dist/ideafy.app/Contents/MacOS/Electron' 'node_modules/electron/dist/ideafy.app/Contents/MacOS/ideafy' 2>/dev/null; printf 'ideafy.app/Contents/MacOS/ideafy' > node_modules/electron/path.txt && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleExecutable ideafy' 'node_modules/electron/dist/ideafy.app/Contents/Info.plist' && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleName ideafy' 'node_modules/electron/dist/ideafy.app/Contents/Info.plist' && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :CFBundleDisplayName ideafy' 'node_modules/electron/dist/ideafy.app/Contents/Info.plist' && cp icons/app-icon.icns 'node_modules/electron/dist/ideafy.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns' 2>/dev/null; true
